items.summary: Update the Correspondence (Korespondencja) printable letter PDF so the main letter body text is left-aligned (not centered) in the PDF generated by `generateLetterPDF` in `frontend/src/lib/pdfGenerator.ts`.

Update the Correspondence (Korespondencja) printable letter PDF so the signature block containing the lines "Z ufnością w Boże miłosierdzie" and "ks. Marek Michalczyk" is shifted slightly to the right (not centered at the bottom of the page) in the PDF generated by `generateLetterPDF` in `frontend/src/lib/pdfGenerator.ts`.
